# item(for:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the web history item that corresponds to the specified web location.

## Declaration

```swift
func item(for URL: URL!) -> WebHistoryItem!
```

## Parameters

- **URL**: The location, as a URL, of the webpage that was visited.

## Return Value

The web history item that represents visits to the specified URL, or `nil` if none was found.

## Getting Web History Items

- **orderedItemsLastVisited(onDay:)**: Returns web history items that were last visited on the specified date.
- **orderedLastVisitedDays**: An array of all calendar days represented in the web history.

items.description: Returns web history items that were last visited on the specified date.
items.name: orderedItemsLastVisited(onDay:)

items.description: An array of all calendar days represented in the web history.
items.name: orderedLastVisitedDays
